key_insight: InvDesMobility adds a reliability gate to inverse materials design so only sufficiently validated first-principles results are fed back into the model.
engineering_relevance: This improves closed-loop materials discovery by making high-cost DFT data auditable, provenance-aware, and safer to use for ranking and generation.
method: Multi-agent automated DFT workflow with evidence stratification
Split feedback into relaxed structures for the generative model and retained mobility channels for the acquisition model
Reliability-gated release and validation priority based on channel-level quality
evidence_signal: Using 516 2DMatPedia-derived candidates, the workflow produced 280 QC-passed materials, retained 573 seed channels, screened 2.4×10^6 structures, and submitted 102 candidates for DFT validation.
watch_item: The framework depends on careful reliability thresholds and workflow assumptions, so overly strict gating may discard useful data while weak gating may admit noisy feedback.
paper_title: InvDesMobility: a reliability-gated first-principles feedback framework for closed-loop materials discovery
